package rulecoverage

func NegativeCorsAllowAllOrigins() string {
    ruleID := "cors_allow_all_origins"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` combined with `Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true`, or CORS middleware configured with `AllowAllOrigins: true` in Gin/Echo/Chi"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
